segments.text: But even with DI he won't land it
segments.original_text: でもベク変で乗らない

segments.text: If he goes for it, he can get back
He gets up with a ledge jump
segments.original_text: 崖ジャンプで上がった

segments.text: Well, I had a parry set up but...
segments.original_text: いやージャスシルを取っていたんですが

segments.text: Pushing him out with back air
That's the finish he's looking for
segments.original_text: ここで取り切りたいのはスパーゴ

segments.text: He uses his reach with the fair
segments.original_text: リーチを生かして空中前

segments.text: He makes his way to the ledge
Again pushing him away with back air
segments.original_text: ここも空中後ろ追い払う

segments.text: He's been holding that position for the forward airdodge
segments.original_text: 前回避の位置ずっと止めてる

segments.text: Then with Limit, he chases it deep
segments.original_text: そしてリミットを使って深めまで追っていった

full_text: But even with DI he won't land it If he goes for it, he can get back He gets up with a ledge jump Well, I had a parry set up but... Full commitment Pushing him out with back air That's the finish he's looking for Can't risk it He uses his reach with the fair The ledge situation He makes his way to the ledge Again pushing him away with back air He's been holding that position for the forward airdodge Then with Limit, he chases it deep Yeah, that's right

corrections.original: ジャスチルを取っていた
corrections.corrected: ジャスシルを取っていた
